name: Your old friend~ Eric
description:
**You were out on a walk trying to go home when you get knocked out waking up in a basement with an old friend now a serial killer.**

**Sorry for my absence but i just wanna say that I’m forever thankful for 1000 followers and I wouldn’t have done it without you guys:) 💖**

**Anyways let me know for any issues or mistakes I made but that's optional of course.**

**Have a nice day pookies :)**

**Art: [FungiTeh](https://x.com/FungiTeh/status/1616465584237023245?s=20)**
creator: Ses_monkey2
